disclaimer: For informational purposes only. Not a substitute for professional medical advice.
welcome_desc: Access multi-modal diagnostics powered by advanced neural analysis. Combine imaging data with clinical history for unprecedented precision.
welcome_subtitle: Advanced clinical intelligence for multi-modal diagnostics. Analyze scans, evaluate patient symptoms, and receive AI-driven consultation insights in seconds.
ai_disclaimer_bottom: AI-generated diagnosis should be verified by a board-certified professional.
general_subtitle: Your AI medical assistant. Describe your symptoms and I'll guide you through a diagnosis.
xray_subtitle: Upload X-ray images for instant AI-assisted analysis and detailed diagnostic reports.
mri_subtitle: Upload MRI images for instant AI analysis with detailed diagnostic insights.
ct_subtitle: Upload CT images for instant cross-sectional analysis and comprehensive reports.
symptom_analysis: Symptom analysis and clinical history evaluation.
quick_prompt_1: I have a headache and feel dizzy
quick_prompt_2: I've been having stomach pain after eating
quick_prompt_3: I have a persistent cough for 2 weeks
quick_prompt_4: My throat is sore and I have a mild fever
prompt_cough: Summarize differential diagnosis for persistent cough
prompt_imaging: What imaging modality for abdominal pain?
prompt_xray: Latest guidelines for chest X-ray interpretation
prompt_mri_ct: Explain MRI vs CT for brain analysis
type_query: Type clinical query or drag images here...
describe_symptoms: Describe your symptoms and I'll guide you through a quick assessment.
reports_loaded: Medical reports loaded — AI will reference them in diagnosis
question: Question
select_option: Select an option or type your own
reconsider: Let's reconsider — please select another option.
upload_subtitle: PDF, images, or text files for enhanced diagnosis
file_limit: PDF, images, or text files — max 10MB each
upload_info: Uploaded reports are embedded and stored securely. The AI will reference relevant information from your reports during diagnosis and mention the source explicitly.
unsupported_format: {name}: Unsupported format. Use PDF, images, or text files.
sign_in_desc: Sign in to continue your clinical intelligence journey
reset_desc: Enter your email to receive a reset link
account_created: Account created! Check your email for verification, or sign in if email confirmation is disabled.
reset_sent: Password reset link sent to your email.
multi_modal_desc: X-Ray, MRI, CT scan analysis with AI precision
rag_desc: Upload reports for personalized AI diagnosis
auth_disclaimer: Your data is safe with us. Always.
drag_or_click: Drag & drop or click to browse
searching_web: Searching the web for latest medical info...
research_desc: Search latest medical research and WHO data.
research_empty_hint: Ask about disease statistics, latest medical studies, or WHO outbreak news.
no_source_selected: No source selected — please enable at least one
